title: Assembly elections 2026 live: Campaigning ends in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry ahead of April 9 voting
description: Assembly elections 2026 Live: Campaigning ended in Kerala, Assam and Puducherry, with voting set on April 9 for 296 seats. Tamil Nadu votes on April 23, Bengal on April 23 and 29 in two phases. Results are due to be announced on May 4.
